name: claudex
description: 7 harness commands for Claude Code and Codex: /harness (8-agent build pipeline with Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git), /harness-team (parallel multi-worker build with per-Worker Sentinel gate), /harness-qa (functional QA with Playwright + Security Track), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline). 25 specialized agent prompts with Mythos-ready containment, Security Triage, Adaptive Scale Protocol, and anti-fabrication defenses.
